description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style armchair upholstered in rich, dark brown leather. The armchair features deep button tufting across the backrest, arms, and seat border, giving it a luxurious and traditional appearance. The arms are rolled and generously padded, seamlessly curving to match the height of the backrest, which is also rounded and tufted. The seat cushion is thick, plush, and removable, with visible creasing and wear that adds to its character. The chair stands on four short, rounded wooden legs, which are stained to match the dark tone of the leather. The overall build is robust and inviting, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A dark brown, tufted leather Chesterfield armchair with rolled arms, a plush seat cushion, and rounded wooden legs. Its classic, luxurious design is both sturdy and inviting.
description_view_0: The left side and partial back of the armchair are visible, highlighting the rolled armrest, deep button tufting, and the curve of the backrest.
description_view_1: The front view shows the thick, plush seat cushion, both rolled armrests, and the full extent of the tufted backrest.
description_view_2: The right side and partial back are visible, mirroring the left side with the same rolled armrest and tufted details.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the rounded, fully upholstered backrest with button tufting and the two rear wooden legs.
attribute_armrest_design: rolled and padded, fully upholstered in tufted leather
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, high, and deeply tufted with button detailing
